sections.title: Standard dialogue after finishing Icthlarin's Little Helper

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Hello again. How can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are things going here?

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Things are slowly coming back to life in our city of the dead. The bank under the Temple of the Lesser Gods has been restored, and a number of our merchants have reopened their stalls.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about the plagues?

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: We're making progress on them. With our citizens back, we had enough people to finally deal with the frogs and locusts that were filling the town up.

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: We worried they'd just come back, but perhaps we have managed to appease whichever god sent them.

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: The infected cows have been handled as well. The only plague left now is this infuriating pox. Still, at least it isn't contagious.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any sign of Menaphos opening up again?

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: They are adamant that their city must remain closed until all the plagues have gone. Until we can get rid of the pox, I can't see their gates opening to us, or to anyone else.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well at least things are moving in the right direction.

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Indeed. Now, is there anything else I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have another lamp?

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: I'm afraid I only had the one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No. I should get going.

sections.title: Standard dialogue after finishing Beneath Cursed Sands

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are things going here?

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Wonderful! The city of the dead has fully come back to life, and it's all thanks to you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I'm happy to have helped. Any news from Menaphos?

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: They are continuing their preparations. It will take some time, but the city will soon be open once more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have another circlet?

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Certainly, though it will cost you 10,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: You don't seem to have enough money for it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's too much.

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Fair enough. Let me know if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I should get going.

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Until next time.

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Hey, hey, hey! What in the name of sweet suffering Icthlarin are you doing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought this acne potion might clear up your spots.

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: All that you'll achieve by pouring that potion on me is to ruin my lovely robes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I was just trying to help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there. I was wondering if you could do me a favour?

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Oh? What kind of favour?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I know cremation isn't your way, but is there anything you could do with these ashes?

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Well, like you say, it is not really our way. Still, with all you've done for us, I'm willing to try.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's all I ask. Thank you.
